title: habenaria albida var. straminea
intro: Habenaria albida var. straminea, also known as the yellowish-green flowering orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Habenaria albida var. straminea include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
